analysis_status: reviewer-driven replacement of the legacy absolute-slope RMS lability analysis

legacy_diagnostic.decision: legacy negative correlation and median-split quadrants are withdrawn

revised_primary_cohort.eligibility: all seven linear endpoints, all four predictors per endpoint, minimum n >= 10
revised_primary_cohort.module_weighting: orientation, colour and shape receive equal weight
revised_primary_cohort.hue: excluded from this precision-corrected primary test because archived species-level circular vectors lack component standard errors

noise_adjusted_axis_test.estimator: mean(beta_std^2 - se^2) within trait, then equal module average
noise_adjusted_axis_test.interpretation: unbiased association-energy estimator under approximately normal slope errors; negative values indicate no resolved excess signal and are not negative biological responsiveness

claim_boundary: No common coupling between visible variation and latent environment-trait slope magnitude was detected after sampling precision was modelled. This is not evidence that every module is biologically invariant.
